means.idiom-jp: (習慣的に)〜を始める；〜にふける
means.example-sentence: Tom took to running long distances in an attempt to lose some weight.
means.sentence-jp: トムは体重を落とそうと長距離のランニングを始めた。

means.example-sentence: My sister took to her new teacher as soon as she met her.
means.sentence-jp: 私の妹は新任の先生に会うとすぐに彼女のことを好きになった。
